title: N03D · Split n Tap
note: The supplied SPLIT N TAP object is a placeholder icosphere, so this comparison evaluates its intended nested Split n Tap WIP asset group directly in both engines. Blender's Mesh-to-Curve minimum-twist normals close the loft seam, top cap, and former Z-bound residual. Split and part-selection require missing Object/Object Parent assignments, so the browser hides those nonfunctional controls.
